title: [MTR] Citaro 0530 Facelift
description: Mercedes-Benz Citaro O530 facelift conversion pack featuring multiple door configurations and left-hand/right-hand drive variants for MTR.
body:
### Description

This resource pack converts the original eCitaro model by NonPlayerCharacter into a Mercedes-Benz Citaro O530 facelift. The model has been redesigned with O530-specific styling, including a revised front end, rear section, roof equipment, and bodywork.

### Included Variants

* 3-door Right-Hand Drive (RHD)
* 2-door Right-Hand Drive (RHD)
* 2-door Left-Hand Drive (LHD)
* 1-door Left-Hand Drive (LHD)

These variants provide a flexible base for creating liveries from across Europe, including operators in the United Kingdom, Germany, the Netherlands, Belgium, Switzerland, and many other countries.

### Features

* Mercedes-Benz Citaro O530 facelift conversion
* Multiple door layouts
* Left-hand and right-hand drive versions
* Custom destination displays
* Suitable for European and UK liveries
* Optimised for MTR

### Credits

* Original eCitaro model: NonPlayerCharacter

### Original Pack

[NPC's Electric Bus Pack](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/npcs-electric-bus-pack?utm_source=chatgpt.com)
